title: Four basic principles that are living and keep alive
content:
Four basic principles that are living and keep alive

In 2011, founded by Rector Prof. Dr. Nevzat Tarhan, 'Pluralism, Participation, Libertarianism, Critisizability' has surpassed the important achievements so far with these 4 principles, and Uskudar University lives and maintains these 4 principles on every platform with all its academic, administrative and expert family members, especially its students...

The 4 principles, included in the book 'Beautiful Human Model and Values' written by Tarhan, are the important values that should be maintained, especially in universities where universal information is produced.

Üsküdar News Agency (ÜHA)
